item.name: Clavekeeper
item.description:
This territorial species of moray patrols an area stretching from Seagazer Shoals to the coast of the Clave.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: This singular species of moray dwells primarily on the coast of Kholusia, and is so named for its inexplicable habit of threatening anyone or anything which approaches the Clave. While most consider this behavior passing strange, others regard these self-appointed guardians with a degree of reverence.
